species: Thauera-dominated alkylbenzene-oxidizing nitrate-reducing bacterial (ABO-NRB) enrichment consortium

growth_records.strain: Enrichment from MHGC field produced water 18PW (Thauera aromatica-like; Pseudomonas stutzeri-like)
growth_records.medium: CSBK medium + 10 mM nitrate + 1.2 mM ethylbenzene (aqueous feed)

up.method: HPLC; volumetric steady-state consumption (mu=D, effluent nitrate ~0)
volumetric feed-based; D x feed conc

sec.method: nitrate reduced to N2 (transient nitrite); not quantified

growth_records.cite: Suri, Navreet et al. Microbially Enhanced Oil Recovery by Alkylbenzene-Oxidizing Nitrate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2019). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2019.01243. [PMC6591262]
growth_records.snippet: Flow was then started by injection of CSBK medium with 10 mM nitrate and 1.2 mM ethylbenzene ... at a rate of 10 mL/day (dilution rate, D = 0.1 d-1) ... the effluent concentrations of nitrate and nitrite decreased to zero at day 20 in all c
growth_records.notes: Chemostat steady state: mu=D=0.1 d-1 = 0.1/24 = 0.00417 /h; doubling_time=ln2/mu=0.693/0.00417=166.3 h. Volumetric nitrate uptake q=D*(S_in-S_out)=0.1 d-1*(10-0) mM=1.0 mmol/L/d=1.0/24=0.0417 mmol/L/h (effluent nitrate reduced to zero at steady state). Ethylbenzene feed uptake (upper bound, feed-based) = 0.1*1.2=0.12 mmol/L/d=0.005 mmol/L/h. Per-gDW rates NOT derivable (no gDW biomass reported; only OD600=3.12 at day65 for EB-fed culture). Mixed enrichment consortium, Thauera dominant (17.8% at D=0.1). Temperature range 22-25C (mid 24).

growth_records.strain: Enrichment from MHGC field produced water 18PW
growth_records.medium: CSBK medium + 10 mM nitrate + 1.2 mM ethylbenzene (aqueous feed)

up.method: HPLC; volumetric steady-state consumption (mu=D; effluent nitrate ~0 after day 65)
volumetric feed-based; D x feed conc

sec.method: nitrate reduced to N2; not quantified

growth_records.cite: Suri, Navreet et al. Microbially Enhanced Oil Recovery by Alkylbenzene-Oxidizing Nitrate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2019). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2019.01243. [PMC6591262]
growth_records.snippet: Increasing the rate of medium influx to 20 mL/day (D = 0.2 d-1) gave incomplete reduction ... up to 5 to 7 mM from day 35 to 65 after which the effluent nitrate and nitrite concentrations remained at zero.
growth_records.notes: Chemostat: mu=D=0.2 d-1=0.00833 /h; doubling_time=ln2/mu=0.693/0.00833=83.2 h. Volumetric nitrate uptake at steady state (post-day65, effluent nitrate=0)=D*S_in=0.2*10=2.0 mmol/L/d=0.0833 mmol/L/h. Ethylbenzene feed=0.2*1.2=0.24 mmol/L/d=0.010 mmol/L/h. Biomass OD600=3.12 at day 65. Per-gDW not derivable.

growth_records.strain: Enrichment from MHGC field produced water 18PW
growth_records.medium: CSBK medium + 10 mM nitrate + 1.4 mM toluene (aqueous feed)

up.method: HPLC; volumetric steady-state consumption (mu=D; effluent nitrate=0 at day 20)
volumetric feed-based; D x feed conc

sec.method: nitrate reduced to N2 (transient nitrite); not quantified

growth_records.cite: Suri, Navreet et al. Microbially Enhanced Oil Recovery by Alkylbenzene-Oxidizing Nitrate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2019). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2019.01243. [PMC6591262]
growth_records.snippet: During flow the continuous cultures received medium with 10 mM nitrate and ... 1.4 mM of aqueous toluene ... the effluent concentrations of nitrate and nitrite decreased to zero at day 20
growth_records.notes: Toluene-fed chemostat: mu=D=0.1 d-1=0.00417 /h; td=166.3 h. Volumetric nitrate uptake=0.1*10=1.0 mmol/L/d=0.0417 mmol/L/h. Toluene feed=0.1*1.4=0.14 mmol/L/d=0.0058 mmol/L/h. Final biomass OD600=3.35 (toluene-fed). Per-gDW not derivable.

growth_records.strain: Enrichment from MHGC field produced water 18PW

up.method: HPLC; volumetric steady-state consumption (mu=D; effluent nitrate=0 post-day65)

sec.method: nitrate reduced to N2; not quantified

growth_records.cite: Suri, Navreet et al. Microbially Enhanced Oil Recovery by Alkylbenzene-Oxidizing Nitrate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2019). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2019.01243. [PMC6591262]
growth_records.snippet: Increasing the rate of medium influx to 20 mL/day (D = 0.2 d-1) ... after which the effluent nitrate and nitrite concentrations remained at zero.
growth_records.notes: Toluene-fed chemostat: mu=D=0.2 d-1=0.00833 /h; td=83.2 h. Volumetric nitrate uptake=0.2*10=2.0 mmol/L/d=0.0833 mmol/L/h. Toluene feed=0.2*1.4=0.28 mmol/L/d=0.0117 mmol/L/h. Per-gDW not derivable.
